channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Lightning acquire Gourde and Bjorkstrand and Panthers get Vanecek as NHL trade action heats up
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning answered the cross-state-rival and defending Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers' first couple of additions ahead of the NHL trade deadline with a big move of their own Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jai Lucas, Miami finalize agreement to make him Hurricanes' coach, AP source says
item.description: Jai Lucas and Miami have finalized the contract that makes him the school’s new men’s basketball coach, nearly two weeks after they struck preliminary agreement on a deal, a person with knowledge of the talks said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Tim Tebow teases 1st baby's gender with black-and-white photos before making big announcement
item.description: Tim Tebow and his wife have revealed the gender of their first baby due this summer — but not before giving their fans, and themselves, a little tease.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chase Briscoe wins appeal over modified spoiler during Daytona 500 pole-winning run
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Chase Briscoe and Joe Gibbs Racing won their appeal Wednesday when the National Motorsports Appeals Panel said his Toyota did not have an illegally modified spoiler when he won the Daytona 500 pole.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Liverpool stuns PSG with late winner in Champions League and 10-man Barcelona beats Benfica
item.description: Harvey Elliott scored less than a minute after coming on as a late substitute to fire Liverpool to a stunning 1-0 win against Paris Saint-Germain in the first leg of the Champions League round of 16.
item.dc:creator: James Robson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Donato scores twice, Blackhawks snap 5-game skid with 6-3 road win over Ducks
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) — Ryan Donato had two goals and an assist, and the Blackhawks ended a five-game losing streak with a 6-3 road victory over the Anaheim Ducks on Saturday night. Teuvo Teravainen had a goal and two assists and Lukas Reichel, Wyatt Kaiser and Patrick Marron also scored.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Tight ends and defensive backs
item.description: At the NFL Scouting Combine, defensive backs and tight ends are going through drills at Lucas Oil Stadium, with prospects like Gunnar Helm, Harold Fannin Jr., Malaki Starks, Sebastian Castro, and Kevin Winston Jr. showcasing their skills and potential to contribute to NFL teams.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: GJ Girls Basketball wins opening playoff game, set for battle with #1 seed
item.description: In the first-ever playoff basketball game played at Grand Junction's brand-new gym, the Tigers came out on top.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5
